title: Ketika Berhenti di Sini
overview: Dita meets Ed. The meeting, which started with a misunderstanding, ended in a long and warm conversation. Ed, who is crazy about all kinds of riddles, asks Dita to complete a riddle challenge from him, in an adventure that ends romantically.
